headline: Lucas Bergvall
body: Nottingham Forest view Lucas Bergvall as their top target to replace Elliot Anderson, as revealed on talkSPORT. Talks ongoing after a £38m bid rejected, as JPercyTelegraph called.🇸🇪
raw_text:
Nottingham Forest view Lucas Bergvall as their top target to replace Elliot Anderson, as revealed on @talkSPORT.

Talks ongoing after a £38m bid rejected, as @JPercyTelegraph called.🇸🇪
